/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/museum.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/museum.dir/src/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/museum.dir/src/stb_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/museum.dir/include/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/museum.dir/include/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/museum.dir/include/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/museum.dir/include/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/museum.dir/include/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/museum.dir/include/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/museum.dir/include/gl3w/gl3w.c.o -o museum  -Wl,-rpath,/home/escazure/cpp_projects/museum/libs /home/escazure/cpp_projects/museum/libs/libassimp.so -lglfw -ldl /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
